title: ASSISTANT DIRECTOR (LEGAL SERVICE)
description:
(PERMANENT POSITION)


ASSISTANT DIRECTOR (LEGAL SERVICE)

SINGAPOREANS/ PRs ONLY

(Salary – $10,000.00 - $18,000.00 - Nego)


LOCATIONS

Town


WORKING HOURS

  • Mondays-Fridays: 8.30am to 6.00pm

JOB DESCRIPTION

The selected candidate will provide legal advice and support in all aspects of its functions and duties, including

  • Partner with senior leadership to shape, review, and implement organisational policies, regulatory strategies, and governance frameworks.

  • Lead the drafting and development of regulatory instruments, including primary and subsidiary legislation,

  • Serve as a key legal advisor by providing authoritative legal opinions and statutory interpretation on legislation administered by Client and other relevant Singapore laws.

  • Oversee and provide high-level legal guidance on a broad and complex range of legal, regulatory, and risk-related matters.

  • Direct the drafting, review, and negotiation of corporate and commercial documents, including tender documentation, Memoranda of Understanding (MOUs), tenancy agreements, and other contractual arrangements.

  • Establish, institutionalise, and continuously enhance internal legal policies, procedures, and advisory frameworks across different stakeholders, including the development of a central legal knowledge repository.

  • Strategically manage and advise on sensitive, high-risk, or potentially contentious matters to mitigate legal and reputational exposure.

  • Lead the engagement, management, and performance of external legal counsel, ensuring cost-effective and timely legal support.

  • Undertake and lead special projects and assignments as directed by senior management.


JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Qualified legal practitioner with a recognised law degree and admission to the Singapore Bar or another Commonwealth jurisdiction.
  • Minimum of four years’ post-qualification experience, preferably within complex or regulated environments.
  • Demonstrated experience in corporate and commercial legal work, with strong capabilities in contract law considered an advantage.
  • Highly self-driven professional with strong analytical, problem-solving, and strategic thinking skills.
  • Proven ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver sound legal outcomes under tight timelines and pressure.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to articulate legal advice clearly, persuasively, and with sound judgment.
  • Collaborative team player who is equally capable of working independently, exercising discretion, and operating with minimal supervision.

Interested applicants, please email detailed to-

SERVICE CONNECTIONS HR CONSULTANCY PTE LTD

Email resume to - servcon@singnet.com.sg / recruit@serviceconnections.com.sg


Call for more details please call at 6333 0052

Mondays to Fridays

9.00am - 5.00pm

111 North Bridge Road #07-30 Peninsula Plaza Singapore 179098
www.serviceconnections.com.sg

License no: 09C4937 / R1102931
